violations.text: The ice machine and dishwasher is lacking an air gap. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025
The door to the employee toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025
